n: Book 7, Chapter 2: The Point of Decision

steps.t: The Mirror of Galadriel is within her garden, in Caras Galadhon. Galadriel has asked you to peer into her mirror and see what awaits the Fellowship on…
Galadriel is in her garden in Caras Galadhon. You have peered into her mirror, and should now speak to Galadriel about what you have seen.
